prose:
Frontier-orbital gap (HOMO–LUMO) for water — DFT, tier ‘standard’ (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: fixed experimental xyz supplied by the user (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz); single-point calculation, no further relaxation (notation: DFT//input geometry). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings were reported by the engine.  Live engine output was written during the run to a frontier_<timestamp>.out log in the working directory; you can open or tail that file for the full SCF transcript and timing details.

Result: HOMO = –8.6037183 eV, LUMO = +0.33695037 eV → HOMO–LUMO gap = 8.9406687 eV.

Method provenance: B3LYP/def2-TZVP (density-fitted) single‐point energy and orbital calculation using PySCF  (chemkit ‘frontier-orbitals’ skill, invoked with --method dft --tier standard).
